theme.archetype: Archetype 3 (Pastel & Soft) mixed with Soft Utility

layout.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use p-6, p-8, p-12. Avoid cramped p-2/p-4 unless deep inside widgets.
layout.dashboard_grid: Use BENTO GRID (Control Room Mode). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. gap-4 or gap-6.
layout.border_radius: rounded-2xl for main cards, rounded-xl for inner elements. Subtly rounded, no sharp edges.

surfaces.dashboard_cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border (border-border), no massive shadows. On hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-lg.
surfaces.glassmorphism: Use for top nav and floating elements: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 (light) or bg-[#1a1a2e]/80 (dark). 1px inner stroke.
surfaces.neumorphism: Avoid heavy 3D neumorphism. Use 'Tactile' variants for step trackers: soft inner shadows and sharp 1px borders.

components_strategy.forms: Use React Hook Form + Shadcn UI. Inputs must have clear focus states: focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1D9E75]/50 focus:border-[#1D9E75].
components_strategy.buttons: Primary button uses bg-[#1D9E75] text-white. MUST have hover state explicitly defined.
components_strategy.navigation: Top Nav Bar required on all pages. Mobile: Bottom navigation bar fixed at bottom (hidden on desktop).
components_strategy.dark_mode_toggle: Sun/Moon icon top right corner, saves to localStorage.
components_strategy.toast: Use Sonner for toast notifications. Clean, bottom-right positioning.
components_strategy.loaders: Replace generic spinners with pulsing icons or elegant skeleton loaders using rounded-xl.
components_strategy.analytics: Recharts for Warden Dashboard. Use the 'dark' or 'light' palette colors for the data series. Primary line: #1D9E75.

motion.hover: All interactive elements must have transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease.
motion.click: Scale down slightly on active: scale-95.
motion.lists: Staggered entrance animations using Framer Motion.
motion.emoji_ratings: Framer Motion scaling emojis (scale up to 1.5x on hover/click).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over colored backgrounds meets 4.5:1 ratio. Green #1D9E75 needs white text.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-button', data-testid='theme-toggle').
accessibility.focus: Clear focus rings on all keyboard navigation.

login_hero.description: Architectural photography of a modern, aesthetic student housing campus at golden hour. Used for the Login Page hero side.

lost_items.description: A book, headphones, and pen on a table. Placeholder for Lost & Found grid.
Black corded headphones, silver MacBook. Placeholder for Lost & Found grid.

mess_food.description: Flatbread beside steam rice and stew meat platter. Placeholder for Mess Menu previews.
A metal tray topped with different types of food. Placeholder for Mess Menu previews.

student_avatar.description: Profile picture of a female student for the dashboard.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the color palette provided in light and dark mode.
Use the Bento Grid mode for the Home Dashboard. Avoid repetitive equal-sized square cards.
Implement the Multi-step form for Maintenance Reporter with clear, tactile visual trackers.
Add Recharts in the Warden Dashboard. Make sure charts use appropriate text colors based on the current theme.
Ensure 'data-testid' is attached to EVERY interactive element (buttons, tabs, inputs, links).
Include a smooth toggle for Dark/Light mode in the top right.
Ensure Mobile-First approach: Use bottom navigation purely for mobile screens and hide it on desktop.
Use Framer Motion for emoji meal ratings in the Mess section to make them pop when interacted with.
Use the specific media URLs provided for placeholders. Do not use random placeholder services.
